title: EssentialsY [🐛Alpha]
description: Death chests (Graves), combat log, RTP, Bounty, Item protect. An all-in-one plugin that adds multiple essential features inside one plugin
body:
# EssentialsY

> A modern, modular, high-performance Essentials plugin built for Paper 1.20+

EssentialsY is a lightweight yet powerful utility plugin designed specifically for modern SMP and PvP servers.  
It replaces multiple small plugins with a clean, scalable, and optimized solution.

Built for performance. Built for flexibility. Built for growth.

---

EssentialsY focuses on:

- Modern architecture
- Modular system
- Async-safe design
- SMP-focused features
- Clean configuration
- Performance first

---

# Features

---

## Death Chest System

- Spawns a protected chest at player death location
- Owner-only access
- Configurable expiration timer
- Auto cleanup system
- Explosion protection (optional)
- Per-world enable/disable
- Persistent across restarts

Perfect for SMP servers.

---

## Smart RTP (Random Teleport)

- Async-safe location generation
- Per-world radius configuration
- Biome blacklist support
- Ocean avoidance
- Lava avoidance
- Safe block checks
- Cooldown system
- No lag spikes

Designed specifically for Paper servers.

---

## Advanced Combat Tag

- Tag both attacker and victim
- Bossbar combat timer
- Block specific commands while tagged
- Combat log penalties
- Optional head drop
- Configurable duration
- Ignore mob damage

Lightweight but powerful.

---

## Item Protection System

- `/lockitem` — Prevent dropping and moving
- `/soulbound` — Item binds to player
- Uses PersistentDataContainer (no lore hacks)
- Optional chest storage prevention
- Owner-only pickup for soulbound items
- No database required

Perfect for rare or custom items.

---

## Item-Based Bounty System (No Economy Required)

- `/bounty set <player>`
- Uses item in hand as reward
- GUI to view active bounties
- Broadcast on set and claim
- Persistent storage
- Configurable expiration
- Tracks top hunters

Ideal for PvP and competitive SMP servers.

---

# Modular Design

Each feature is fully modular.

You can enable or disable modules individually:

- deathchest
- rtp
- combat
- itemprotect
- bounty

Disable what you don’t need. Keep your server lightweight.

---

# Built for Performance

- Paper 1.20+ optimized
- Java 17+
- Async-safe operations
- No unnecessary tasks
- No heavy dependencies
- Clean memory handling

Designed to handle large SMP servers.

---

# Configuration

Each module has its own config file
